package rulecoverage

func NegativeServiceMethodAcceptsMapStringAnyInput() string {
    ruleID := "service_method_accepts_map_string_any_input"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Services that use map-shaped dynamic input instead of typed request contracts."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
